consistency.name: Consistent
consistency.type: Consistent ('Weapon (any sword that deals slashing damage)' matches source description)

quality.completeness: High. Contains all relevant mechanical and flavor text.
quality.clarity: High. The effect of the 'decapitation' rule is clearly explained, including exceptions.
quality.structure: Good. Standard JSON structure for an item.

special_effect.trigger: Rolling a 20 on an attack roll against a creature with at least one head.
special_effect.effect: Cuts off one head, resulting in instantaneous death unless the creature can survive without it.
exceptions: Doesn't have or need a head.
special_effect.alternative_damage: If the special effect fails due to an exception, the hit deals an extra 6d8 slashing damage.

analysis.archivist_notes: The item entry is comprehensive and mechanically sound based on standard fantasy role-playing conventions. The 'source_type_rarity' field seems to be redundant data scraped from the original source but does not introduce errors.
